problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of BDNF. BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
